topic: Graph metadata relationship validation and entity quality analysis
originalKeyQuestions: RQ-1: How many declared depends_on edges resolve to actual spec folders on disk? What is the broken-edge rate?
RQ-2: Are there dependency cycles in the graph? If so, which folders participate?
RQ-3: Do children_ids match actual child directories? What is the ghost-child rate?
RQ-4: What percentage of key_files entries point to files that actually exist? What types of non-existent refs appear?
RQ-5: How many entities are basename-only duplicates of canonical-path entries? What is the noise rate?
RQ-6: Do status values match reality? Compare derived status against implementation-summary.md presence and checklist completion.
RQ-7: What is the distribution of entity counts, key_file counts, and trigger_phrase counts across all folders? Are the limits appropriate?
RQ-8: How many graph-metadata.json files have stale last_save_at timestamps older than their spec-doc mtimes?
